reasoning: As of October 26, 2025, Tesla has not released an unsupervised FSD feature to the public. Despite advancements such as removing the steering wheel nag in FSD V14 and accumulating driverless miles in closed logistics lots, public testing—including the Austin Robotaxi service as of July 2025—still relies on safety drivers. The resolution criteria explicitly demand a system broadly accessible to the public where no continuous supervision or readiness to intervene is required. With just 5 days remaining before the October 31 deadline, there are no credible signs of an imminent public release that would surmount the necessary regulatory approvals and the assumption of liability by Tesla. Thus, it is extremely unlikely this launches in time.
batch_queries: Tesla launches unsupervised full self driving (FSD) by October 31?
